name: conduit
description: Conduit registry for machines, access paths, workloads, and deployment proof.

interface.shortDescription: Route personal infrastructure work through verified machine conduits.
interface.longDescription: Conduit keeps Daniel's machines, access paths, workloads, and deployment proof separate. It models owned local infrastructure such as mac-mini-01 and remote capacity such as rentamac-cyprus-01 without hardcoding work to one machine.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Conduit when work must be built, synced, verified, or run through a known machine conduit.
